name: Fusilier Railgun
description: Tireur lourd PNM spécialisé dans le tir longue portée. Son railgun octogonal perfore les armures les plus épaisses d'un seul projectile.
prompt: Sci-fi dark conceptual art, Martian Purist faction, aggressive high-tech brutalism. Sleek matte crimson red and obsidian black armor and plating. Sharp angular designs, imposing wedge shapes, completely devoid of soft curves. Faceless dehumanizing visors, glowing neon red energy accents, clean pristine surfaces with zero exposed wiring. Sniper kneeling with an oversized octagonal railgun, scope with red glow, angular sniper helmet.
